full_text:
Dong He (Youzai) 董和 (幼宰)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong He (董和), styledYouzai (幼宰), was born in Nan. Suggested asking Zhang Lu for aid against Liu Bei. Admired for his honesty and plain living. Dong He was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Dong He lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
